examples: How the word made the leap from "someone who makes you want to cuddle" to "someone who makes you cringe" isn't really known but there are a few enticing clues.
I cringe when I think of the poems I wrote then.
I cringe when I think of the risks I took.
The confessions posted after the design change were found to be much more cringe-worthy.
Mr. DeMARTINO: They - I think they cringe every time they know I'm climbing so.
